titleStmt.title: SII 6.864: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 864. (A.R. No. 286-U of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śākābdē nāgaratnāruṇaparigaṇitē jy£aiṣṭhaśuklē tṛtīyāsaṁyuktē jīvavārē hariśikha
ripatē[¨r*]mādiśeṭṭissuputraḥ . snanā¨rtaṁ vārikuṁbhaṁ pratidinamadadādvījanaṁ puṣpamalāṁ svābhīṣṭāvā pti
hētōssakaḷaguṇanidhi¨rmalliśeṭṭi¨rvvadānyaḥ . śrīśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1298 gunēṁṭi jyēṣṭa śukla tṛtīyā gu
ruvāramunāṁḍu poṭnūraThe letter ra is engraved below the line.vīṭi maddāla malliśeṭi tana kabhīṣṭa¨rttapiddhigā śrīnarasihanāthuniki nityamu
nnu Oka kuṁcaṁḍu tirumajjanamu teci peṭanu maddiciṁnunā[I]nikiṁ kuṁchapra ṭhāvupaṭi peṭanu kuṁbha
garaya 1 śrībhaṁḍāranu beṭanu maṟinni Ī ciṁgunaĪniki cēta vilciccinatōṁṭagaṭṭu reṁḍu puṣpālannu nitya
munnu Oka tirumāla tiruva¨rddhajāma pūṁṭa deśi peṭṭanu maddi Appaya kuṁca 1 Ī Avasarānana Ālavaṭṭamu
peṭunu perumāṇinaĪni koḍuku cittunaku kuṁcaprasadamu ṭā [Ū]paṭṭi peṭṭenu . Ī dha¨rmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa
śrī śrī śrī . marini Oka divya nibaṁddhamunayavasarananē koluvanu Oḍayadēvakināyu
niki beṭenu kuṁcaprasadamu ṭāvuvaṭi pōyunu Ī divyenūnaku bhaṁḍārananu Oka
māḍa peṭe Ī Avasaranu go(ṁ)ḍuU ṭāṁ nibaṁdhamuku naṁnumaḷi varadunayiniki pe
ṭiṁ cenu . śrīUbayadhupalānu nāmasaṁkī[¨r]tamu cēyanu vijayaciṁgarikini vrasadamuku
cella reṁḍunu ṭāUpaṭi peṭenu . 0 .
Digital edition of SII 6.864 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
